item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, friends of the online variety
I’ve been attacked
attacked yet again
sad really
no need to brag
I’m still not convinced
one of life’s great mysteries
I want to see the wizard
my whole existence is flawed
mmm hmm
hope that person is ok
perfect time for a cig
check out the Mormon nerds in Utah
we’ve all been there
well we already have rum ham at least
obviously
finally a book for this
that’s all for me, have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Eyebleach for these trying times
item.description: Recently I had the privilege to work on a research mobile app to help with suicide prevention. Part of this includes a chat and we had to build in profanity filtering. This meant loading up a list of known swears, inuendos, and racial slurs...and my God. I needed to scrub my eyes after reading such lists! So here's a dump of eyebleach: cute animals, relaxing scenes, and altogether warm feelings to send you on your way! Part of the study works to confirm the statistics of social media interaction and the positive impact it can have on suicide prevention. The theory being: the more connected you are to peers, the greater sense of a belonging, and the lower the risk of self harm. That's what makes places like Imgur potentially great! We just need that social connection, and keep positive posts like this flowing in! And if you're finding yourself reflecting on thoughts of self harm, call 988 (in the US). They're trained professionals willing to talk to you. If you're looking for a quick chat from someone who will never judge, DM me! I'm always happy to learn about folks, your backgrounds, interests, and just how beautiful we can be as human beings.
item.dc:creator: IndianaCones

item.title: Images of Note: I eated it all
item.description:
they are both deeply in love with each other.
angy
SUMMER IS A-CUMMEN IN
Ahhh the American Family Association: More concerned about censoring people than actually helping family.

All this love for Transgirls in STEM. Where's the love for the Social Studies and Humanities Transgirls? (pls i'm lonely).
guy was fucking down to bone.
From the Forest owo
he has been spotted!
Hi Miso
spinn
O-O

item.dc:creator: VanessaBludgeons

item.title: First goal of the new year achieved!
item.description: It's not by a large margin, but I've been weighing myself all week (unhealthy habit, I know) and I've been consistently under 200lbs for a few days now and I'm super proud of myself. As someone who has been overweight (and considered obese as a child and teen) I'm over the moon. I have about another 30lbs to go until I think I'll be satisfied with my weight loss goal, but I think I'm in the right groove with my eating habits, that I should achieve my goal by the end of the year, if not sooner- which is super exciting because I've really been looking forward to getting a tummy tuck as part of my transition. I can't wait to buy my first pair of pants that aren't in the double digits. Anyways, I just figured I'd share my good news with all of you. And in case no one has told you today or if you don't hear it enough, I love you and am proud of you. As always: shine brightly, beautiful people.

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Cool, either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: The misinformation is KILLING US PLEASE HELP
item.description:
I'm not Erin. Go support Erin. https://www.erininthemorning.com/p/debunked-misleading-nyt-anti-trans
Erin Reed: https://twitter.com/ErinInTheMorn/status/1753416419700580597 Julia Serano: https://x.com/JuliaSerano/status/1753456632296796420?s=20 Evan Urquhart: https://twitter.com/assignedmedia/status/1753421168000881112 https://www.assignedmedia.org/breaking-news/pamela-paul-shows-opinion-is-opinion-is-opinion Quinn McLamore: https://twitter.com/GhawinRiver/status/1753466328457908617 Jack Turban: https://twitter.com/jack_turban/status/1753459496226288053 Zinnia Jones: https://twitter.com/ZJemptv/status/1753451711039951110 ____ This is the kind of stuff that gets queer people killed. I've found this video series that just dismantles this stuff an more by Caelan Conrad. Warming, these are long videos and extremely hard to watch because it exposes the people caught up in the gender critical movement for what they are Gender critical: recruitment https://youtu.be/pwI6py78gsI?si=howLEFGBaEXnkoPV Gender critical: conversion therapy https://youtu.be/nBbOw_K6K5Q?si=4tA20l2vROWdCkMx Gender critical: fascism https://youtu.be/BIhwmNGIdo8?si=2c4g6QeVSl7Si25h What is a groomer? https://youtu.be/9c6shP-NcfE?si=TEuqiVPQ0MK_vYqs Drop the T: the deadly consequences of that respectability politics https://youtu.be/6i91PzpWDAM?si=wcBzSGQTWH363aHI

item.title: The Girl With The Green Eyes....
item.description: Trivia: IT WAS ORIGINALLY WRITTEN AS AN 1890s WESTERN. Gary Goldman and David D. Weinstein penned a script together about a cowboy in Chinatown in 1899. The Jack Burton in Goldman and Weinstein's version was an amazing gunman who could shoot the eyes out of a kite in the sky but couldn't hit anybody in a fight. Veteran "script doctor" W.D. Richter (producer/director of The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension) came in for a rewrite, changing it to modern times and using Rosemary's Baby as a guide. "I believed if, like in Rosemary's Baby, you presented the foreground story in a familiar context—rather than San Francisco at the turn-of-the-century, which distances the audience immediately—and just have one simple remove, the world underground, you have a much better chance of making direct contact with the audience," Richter explained. Richter wrote his version in 10 weeks.
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: The perfect strategy for door knockers
item.dc:creator: DigitalWaffle

item.title: Meme Dump part 4 out of 200
item.description:
Thank you for joining me again
On my meme Dumping adventure
I tried to post this
Earlier today
And I filled out
All 50 descriptions
Like it says to do
To hopefully
Generate more views
But my phone
Decided that
The meme dump
Wasn't time
And it didn't process through
And I'll be honest
My random description adventure
Was sentimental
I was in my feels
When I posted it
But my phone
And imgur
Were like
"Girl, not right now -
Go take a nap"
So i did
And I had a little snacky after too
Well it was basically girl dinner
Foraged my house like a squirrel
On some drugs
My girl dinner was
Basically
A handful of M&Ms
A babybell cheese
A mini cucumber
With hunmus
Three cherry tomatoes
Picked out four of the lucky charm marshmellows
Ate those immediately
Did brain jumping jaxs
Between two boxes of crackers
And which one I wanted
But then I saw
That i had popcorn
So I made that
Instead
*giiiirrrl dinneerrrr*
I know I'm going to be hungry
Again in a bit
Then I'll have to go on another drunken squirrel food advenrure
Thanks for joining me for another cleaning out my 11k folder meme Dump ! ♡ Hope you guys have a wonderful Friday and I'll see you tomorrow for another ~
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Wilbur has to pee but it's raining
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Memes I favorited for me and my man in 2023 - 1/?
item.description:
1 the more “professionals” I meet, the more this rings true. Imposter syndrome is such a liar!
2 we are human beings, not human doings (:
3 As an actress I would have to physically go look for pictures myself and end up having to rummage through the laundry bin of unorganized physical photos. It would be a great excuse to actually have some childhood pics lol
4 That’s rough buddy (my man introduced me to ATLA and that rough buddy scene had me in stitches, no glance from my partner required)
5 been dealing with some old habits coming back lately. Trying my best to reduce shame because beating myself up will get me nowhere!
6 My man has ADHD and I introduced him to The Good Place. If you haven’t seen it you really really should!
7 We both watched It’s Always Sunny for the first time in 2023. I liked it, partner not so much.
8 You just never know. I missed support group meetings in January because I caught COVID and their response when I came back was so wholesome and heartwarming.
9 My autoimmune disease decided it wanted to be untreatable in 2023, putting me on meds that cause a combination of weight gain, water retention and increased hunger. I eventually stopped counting calories because this kind of guilt (for eating a slice not the whole cake) was causing more problems than the app solved.
10 My man also introduced me to x-files. :)
11 My man is a great force even with ADHD. <3
12 So THIS is why I’m creating a dump randomly at bedtime….
13 I’m a goof!
14 Relationship Goals
15 I myself cannot work but also do not qualify for benefits. I pay full price on commercial insurance because they don’t give tax credits unless you make a certain taxable amount. I need my assets to live on for the long term, because the longer you are not working they think they don’t need to give you disability benefits because you survived without them. The entire system is really messed up.
16 I have executive dysfunction issues, am physically disabled and get these cravings often (like right now). Desperately wanting to do *something* while your body is simultaneously screaming at you sucks so bad.
17 <3
18 Bentley is too cute to ignore
19 One Day At A Time!
20 After being severely ill for almost a year this is where I’m at. My hope is covered in dirt, grit and blood and tastes like black coffee. Yet it’s the reason why I try every single day and always look for ways to make my situation and the world a better place.
21 My man and I are both programmers but I definitely get a bit more manic about bugs or broken systems. I work a few hours a month running a Wordpress site (I didn’t start it else it would not be WP) and figuring out what is breaking on those is such a b*tch. Earlier this week I couldn’t sleep because having a free product in our store was full of bugs. The frustration is real!
22 seriously this and being carried, such a let down
23 Again, 2023 I was on meds like this. I had to lower one of the meds prematurely because the water retention was causing seizures. Even on a lower dose I’m having a hard time losing weight even when eating very few calories. She was beautiful her entire life and was technically underweight in SW.
24 Have Corgi Can Confirm. He became a trained service dog because of how much he wants to help me. Even at almost 12 he is very dedicated to his job.
25 Dawwwww I wouldn’t mind pairing in this situation!
Bentley tax. Have a great Friday night everyone. :)
item.dc:creator: alisa2089
